## 📝 Description

---

## 📌 Tasks  
- [ ] Write/update documentation for [specific feature or section].  
- [ ] Review for clarity, grammar, and accuracy.  
- [ ] Ensure technical correctness and consistency.  
- [ ] Add relevant images, diagrams, or examples if needed.  

---

## ✅ Acceptance Criteria  
- [ ] Documentation is clear, concise, and complete.  
- [ ] Formatting follows the project's style guide.  
- [ ] Technical accuracy has been verified.  
- [ ] Approved by relevant stakeholders.  

---

## 📂 Additional Information  
- **Assignee:** [Name of the person responsible]  
- **Labels:** [e.g., `documentation`, `update`, `guide`]  
- **Priority:** [low, medium, high]  
- **Related Issues:** [Link to any related issues, if applicable]
